title: PotionSteal
description: This plugin is basically LifeSteal, but with Potion Effects! Get a potion debuff when you die, and get a buff when you kill someone!
body:
PotionSteal is a powerful and flexible PaperMC plugin inspired by LifeSteal—except here, potion effects and a balance system define player "power" instead of hearts! 

**Key Features:**
- **Balance System:** Every player has a customizable "balance" tracked by the plugin. Lose it all, and you get deathbanned!
- **Deathban & Revive:** When a player's balance reaches zero, they are banned. But with a craftable Revive Book, any player can bring them back via an interactive GUI.
- **Custom Elixir Item:** Craft or receive the unique "Elixir of Renewal" potion to regain balance or remove negative effects. The Elixir is hardcoded for consistency.
- **Revive Book Recipe:** Only the Elixir of Renewal (not any generic potion) works in the Revive Book crafting recipe.
- **Admin Commands:** Easily manage balances, immunity, revive players, reload config, and give special items.
- **Custom Tablist:** Show off player balances in the tablist with customizable formatting.
- **Highly Configurable:** Most settings (plugin name, tablist, balance defaults, etc.) are configurable in `config.yml`. The Elixir appearance and properties are hardcoded to ensure all crafting and commands stay consistent.

**How to Use:**
- Use `/potionsteal` or `/ps` commands to check and manage player balances, immunity, elixirs, and revive books.
- Craft an Elixir of Renewal and use it to create a Revive Book.
- Revive banned friends through a simple and intuitive GUI.
- Customize balance defaults, tablist display, and plugin name in `config.yml`.

**Recipes:**  
Recipes for the Elixir of Renewal and Revive Book are available in the Gallery Tab!

**Other Info:**
- After editing `config.yml`, restart the server for changes to apply (the reload command may not work reliably).
- Plugin is open-source under the MIT License!

PotionSteal brings a unique strategic twist to your Minecraft server—perfect for factions, SMP, and custom PvP worlds!
